tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Kings of Leon
Use Somebody
Only By The Night (Album)

note: this sounds better played in barre chords, easier too. The same chords progression 
throughout so I only marked the chords in for the first verse and chorus.

Standard Tuning: EADGBe

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] e
C   8 10 10 9 8 8[/tab]
C/E 0 10 10 9 8 8
F   1 3  3  2 1 1
Am  5 7  7  5 5 5


[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I've been roaming around[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C/E[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
Always looking down at all I see[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Painted faces, fill the places I cant reach[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
You know that I could use somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 You know that I could use somebody[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]C/E[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
 Someone like you, And all you know, And how you speak[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]C/E[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Countless lovers under cover of the street[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
You know that I could use somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 You know that I could use somebody[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Someone like you[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]C/E[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Off in the night, while you live it up, I'm off to sleep[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]C/E[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Waging wars to shape the poet and the beat[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I hope it's gonna make you notice[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
 I hope it's gonna make you notice[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]
Someone like me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]
 Someone like me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
 Someone like me, somebody[/tab]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Bridge]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]

[Solo]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Someone like you, somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
 Someone like you, somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
 Someone like you, somebody[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
 I've been roaming around,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Always looking down at all I see[/tab]
